sprints.question: Step 1 — Plan: Research mobile-first chat UX patterns (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude.ai), mobile input best practices, progressive disclosure, loader transitions. Produce prescriptive spec.
Step 2 — Witness: 11 claims (w2600-w2610). Critical: dvh≠keyboard, hover:none fails Samsung.
Step 3 — Prescribe: cal040 final prescription with all witness corrections.
Step 4 — Implement: Built mobile-first chat interface. 2170→1919 lines.
Step 5 — Witness: 20/20 requirements pass, 0 broken refs.
